message:
fix: surface silently discarded errors in checkpoint, reader reload, and index rebuild

- write_indexing_checkpoint: log error instead of discarding write_durable
  failure, which could cause data loss on restart
- cass_open_search_reader: warn on reader.reload() failure so stale
  search results are at least observable
- CassTantivyIndex::open_or_create: propagate remove_dir_all errors
  (except NotFound) to prevent stale files from contaminating rebuilt
  indexes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
